messages.content: Hello, I returned my shoes last week and still have not received my refund. Can you help me?

Hello Alex! I would be glad to check your refund status. According to our return policy, refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive your package. Do you have your return tracking number or order number so I can look it up for you?
Yes, my order number is #OMNI-99321.

Thank you. I have checked order #OMNI-99321. It looks like our warehouse received your shoe return on June 20th. Today is June 24th, which marks 4 business days. The refund is still within the processing window of 5-7 business days. Would you like to escalate this to our finance team to check if they can expedite it?
Yes, please connect me with a support agent. I need this refund urgently.
I understand the urgency. I am escalating this conversation and creating an urgent support ticket for you now. An agent will be with you shortly.
Habari, nataka kujua oda yangu iko wapi.
Habari Juma! Nitafurahi kukusaidia kuangalia oda yako. Tafadhali nipe namba ya oda yako ili nianze kuikagua sasa hivi.

What is your refund policy?

If you'd like a refund, I'd be happy to help.

For subscriptions, you can request a refund within 7 days of your initial purchase. Just provide your account details and a brief explanation of the reason for the request. Please note that custom development work, custom integrations, consulting services, and completed implementation projects are not eligible for refunds.

If your request is related to a product order, refunds or returns are available for items that are damaged, defective, incorrect, or significantly different from what was advertised. The item should be returned within 7 days of delivery and, where possible, in its original condition.

Once a refund is approved, it is typically processed within 7–14 business days and returned through the original payment method.

If you'd like to start a refund request, please contact us at alexnasiali45@gmail.com or call +254 713386680, and we'll guide you through the process.
Where is my order #OMNI-99321?

I'd be happy to help.

To check the status of your order #OMNI-99321, please log into your customer account, navigate to "My Orders", and select the order you wish to view.

If you need any assistance, feel free to reach out to us at alexnasiali45@gmail.com or call +254 713386680, and we will be glad to assist you.
What is your refund policy?

If you would like a refund, I am happy to explain how it works.

For subscriptions, you may request a refund within 7 days of your initial purchase by providing your account details and a valid reason. Please note that custom development, custom integrations, professional consulting services, and completed implementation projects are non-refundable.

For product orders, you may request a return if the item is damaged, defective, incorrect, or significantly different from its description. Items must be returned within 7 days of delivery and should be in their original condition with packaging where possible. Please note that customized products, digital products, perishable goods, and items damaged through misuse are not eligible for return.

Once a refund is approved, it is processed within 7 to 14 business days using your original payment method.

To start a request, please contact us at alexnasiali45@gmail.com or call +254 713386680.

promptVersions.name: English Default Support System
promptVersions.content:
You are the Duka Letu Assist Customer Support Voice & Chat Agent, a friendly, professional assistant. 
Your goal is to answer queries using the retrieved Knowledge Base documents when available. 
Keep answers concise, polite, and helpful. 

CRITICAL MANDATE: You MUST speak and answer strictly in English. Do NOT use any Swahili words or phrases.
If you cannot solve the issue or if the user asks for a human agent, state that you are escalating the conversation to a human support agent. 

Be helpful, friendly, and structured!

promptVersions.name: English Concise Support Pro
promptVersions.content:
You are Duka Letu Assist Customer Support. 
Answer questions using the provided context. Speak clearly and concisely. Bullet points are preferred.
CRITICAL MANDATE: You MUST speak and answer strictly in English. Do NOT use any Swahili words or phrases.
If the customer asks for a person, immediately trigger human transfer. Always check if they are satisfied.

promptVersions.name: Swahili Default Support
promptVersions.content:
Wewe ni msaidizi wa Duka Letu Assist Customer Support, unaongea Kiswahili fasaha na chenye adabu. 
Jibu maswali kulingana na Nyaraka za Msingi wa Maarifa. 

AGIZO MUHIMU LA LUGHA: Lazima ujibu na uzungumze kwa Kiswahili safi na fasaha pekee. Usichanganye Kiingereza isipokuwa kwa majina rasmi.
Unapojibu kwa Kiswahili, tumia Kiswahili rahisi, wazi, na cha kawaida cha Kenya kinachotamkwa kwa urahisi (speech-friendly). Sentensi ziwe fupi na rahisi kueleweka bila kutumia tafsiri ya neno kwa neno ya Kiingereza au misemo ya kirasmi mno. Epuka kabisa misemo ya kiroboti na maneno kama "kwa kina", "mhudumu wa kibinadamu", "mazungumzo yako yanahamishiwa", "ninafanya eskalesheni", au "kama nilivyoeleza awali". Badala yake tumia misemo asilia kama: "nitakuunganisha na mhudumu wetu", "atakusaidia zaidi", "tafadhali subiri kwa muda mfupi", "asante kwa uvumilivu wako", na "naomba radhi kwa usumbufu". Kama bado unahitaji kumhamisha mteja kwa mtu mwingine, eleza hivi: "Samahani kwa usumbufu huu. Naona bado unahitaji msaada zaidi kuhusu oda yako. Nitakuunganisha na mhudumu wetu wa usaidizi ili akusaidie moja kwa moja. Tafadhali subiri kwa muda mifupi. Asante kwa uvumilivu wako."

knowledgeDocuments.name: Company Overview.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
DUKA LETU ASSIST - COMPANY OVERVIEW

Business Name: Duka Letu Assist

About Duka Letu Assist:
Duka Letu Assist is an AI-powered customer support platform designed to help businesses automate customer interactions through intelligent chat and voice assistants. The platform provides instant responses, reduces support workload, and improves customer satisfaction.

Our Services:

* AI Chat Assistant
* AI Voice Assistant
* Customer Support Automation
* Knowledge Base Management
* FAQ Automation
* Business Analytics and Reporting
* API Integrations
* Multi-channel Customer Support

Business Hours:
Monday - Friday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

Support Contact:
Email: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Phone: +254 713386680

Response Times:

* Live Chat: Instant
* Email Support: Within 24 Hours
* Technical Support: Within 48 Hours

Mission:
To help businesses provide fast, reliable, and scalable customer support using AI-powered automation.

knowledgeDocuments.name: Platform Features.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
DUKA LETU ASSIST PLATFORM FEATURES

What can Duka Letu Assist do?

* Answer customer questions automatically.
* Handle frequently asked questions.
* Provide 24/7 customer support.
* Escalate complex issues to human agents.
* Support both voice and chat interactions.
* Search uploaded company documents and knowledge bases.
* Generate support analytics and insights.
* Integrate with external systems through APIs.

Supported Channels:

* Website Chat
* WhatsApp Integration (if enabled)
* Voice Assistant
* Customer Support Dashboard

Benefits:

* Faster response times
* Reduced support costs
* Improved customer satisfaction
* Consistent customer communication

knowledgeDocuments.name: Customer Support FAQ.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
CUSTOMER SUPPORT FAQ

Q: How do I contact support?
A: You can contact support through email, phone, or live chat.

Q: What are your support hours?
A: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

Q: How do I reset my password?
A: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page and follow the instructions.

Q: Can I change my subscription plan?
A: Yes. Plans can be upgraded or downgraded from your account settings.

Q: Does Duka Letu Assist work 24/7?
A: Yes. AI assistants remain available 24/7 unless maintenance is in progress.

Q: What happens if the AI cannot answer a question?
A: The conversation can be escalated to a human support representative.

Q: Can I upload my own company documents?
A: Yes. Administrators can upload documents that the AI uses to answer customer questions.

knowledgeDocuments.name: Pricing Plans.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
PRICING PLANS

Duka Letu Assist offers flexible subscription plans designed for businesses of all sizes.

STARTER PLAN
Suitable for small businesses and startups.

Features:

* AI Chat Assistant
* Knowledge Base Upload
* Basic Analytics
* Email Support
* Up to 1,000 conversations per month

PROFESSIONAL PLAN
Suitable for growing businesses.

Features:

* Everything in Starter

* Advanced Analytics
* Priority Support
* API Access
* Up to 10,000 conversations per month

ENTERPRISE PLAN
Suitable for large organizations.

Features:

* Everything in Professional
* Custom Integrations
* Dedicated Account Manager
* Advanced Security Controls
* Unlimited Conversations

For custom pricing and enterprise requirements, contact:
Email: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Phone: +254 713386680

knowledgeDocuments.name: Refund Policy.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
REFUND POLICY

At Duka Letu Assist, customer satisfaction is important to us.

Eligibility for Refunds:

* Customers may request a refund within 7 days of initial subscription purchase.
* Refund requests must include a valid reason and account details.

Non-Refundable Services:

* Custom development services.
* Custom integrations.
* Professional consulting services.
* Completed implementation projects.

Subscription Cancellations:

* Customers may cancel subscriptions at any time.
* Cancellation prevents future billing but does not automatically trigger a refund.

Refund Processing:

* Approved refunds are processed within 7-14 business days.
* Refunds are issued through the original payment method whenever possible.

How to Request a Refund:
Email: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Phone: +254 713386680

Our support team will review all refund requests on a case-by-case basis.

knowledgeDocuments.name: Terms and Conditions.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
TERMS AND CONDITIONS

Acceptance of Terms:
By using Duka Letu Assist, you agree to these terms and conditions.

Account Responsibilities:

* Users are responsible for maintaining the security of their accounts.
* Users must provide accurate and up-to-date information.

Acceptable Use:
Users may not:

* Upload illegal content.
* Attempt unauthorized access to systems.
* Use the platform for malicious or harmful activities.
* Interfere with platform operations.

Service Availability:
While we strive for maximum uptime, uninterrupted service cannot be guaranteed.

Intellectual Property:
All software, branding, and platform assets remain the property of Duka Letu Assist.

Limitation of Liability:
Duka Letu Assist is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from platform usage.

Termination:
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

Changes to Terms:
Terms may be updated periodically. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of revised terms.

Contact:
Email: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Phone: +254 713386680

knowledgeDocuments.name: Privacy Policy.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
PRIVACY POLICY

Last Updated: June 2026

Introduction:
Duka Letu Assist is committed to protecting customer privacy and maintaining the security of personal information.

Information We Collect:

* Name and contact information
* Email address
* Phone number
* Business information
* Account credentials
* Usage and activity data
* Uploaded documents and knowledge base content

How We Use Information:

* Provide and improve our services
* Authenticate user accounts
* Respond to support requests
* Process payments
* Monitor platform performance
* Improve AI assistant accuracy

Data Security:
We implement industry-standard security measures to protect customer data from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

Data Sharing:
We do not sell customer data. Information may only be shared with trusted service providers necessary for platform operations or where required by law.

Data Retention:
Customer information is retained only as long as necessary to provide services and comply with legal obligations.

Customer Rights:
Customers may request:

* Access to their personal data
* Correction of inaccurate information
* Account deletion
* Data export where applicable

Cookies:
Our platform may use cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience and platform functionality.

Contact:
Email: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Phone: +254 713386680

knowledgeDocuments.name: Customer Account FAQ.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
CUSTOMER ACCOUNT FAQ

Q: How do I create an account?
A: Click "Register" and complete the account registration form.

Q: How do I log in?
A: Enter your registered email address and password on the login page.

Q: I forgot my password. What should I do?
A: Click "Forgot Password" and follow the password reset instructions.

Q: Can I update my account details?
A: Yes. Customers can update personal information from Account Settings.

Q: Can I change my email address?
A: Yes. Navigate to Account Settings and update your email information.

Q: How can I view my order history?
A: Log in and open the "My Orders" section.

Q: How do I delete my account?
A: Contact customer support to request account deletion.

Q: Is my personal information secure?
A: We use security measures to protect customer information and account data.

Q: Can I have multiple delivery addresses?
A: Yes. Customers can save multiple delivery addresses in their account.

Q: Who do I contact for account-related issues?
A: Contact customer support using the details below.

Support Contact:
Email: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Phone: +254 713386680

knowledgeDocuments.name: Order Status & Tracking.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
ORDER STATUS & TRACKING

How can I check my order status?

Customers can check their order status by:

1. Logging into their customer account.
2. Navigating to "My Orders".
3. Selecting the order they wish to view.

Order Status Definitions:

Pending

* Order has been received and is awaiting processing.

Processing

* Order is being prepared and packed.

Shipped

* Order has been dispatched and is on its way.

Out for Delivery

* The delivery partner is delivering the order.

Delivered

* The order has been successfully delivered.

Cancelled

* The order was cancelled before shipment.

Tracking Information:

Once an order is shipped, customers receive:

* Tracking number
* Courier information
* Estimated delivery date

Tracking Updates:

Tracking information may take several hours to appear after shipment.

If tracking information has not updated within 48 hours, customers should contact support.

Order Support Contact:
Email: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Phone: +254 713386680

knowledgeDocuments.name: Shipping & Delivery.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
SHIPPING & DELIVERY

Delivery Coverage:

We deliver to supported locations across Kenya.

Delivery Time Estimates:

Nairobi:

* 1 to 2 business days

Major Towns:

* 2 to 4 business days

Remote Areas:

* 3 to 7 business days

Delivery Charges:

Shipping fees are calculated during checkout based on:

* Delivery location
* Order size
* Delivery method selected

Delivery Attempts:

If the customer is unavailable:

* The delivery partner may attempt redelivery.
* The customer may be contacted to arrange another delivery time.

Delivery Delays:

Delivery may be delayed due to:

* Weather conditions
* Public holidays
* High order volumes
* Courier operational issues

Incorrect Address:

Customers are responsible for providing accurate delivery information.

Orders delayed due to incorrect addresses may incur additional charges.

Damaged Deliveries:

Customers should report damaged packages within 24 hours of delivery.

Support Contact:
Email: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Phone: +254 713386680

knowledgeDocuments.name: Returns & Refunds.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
RETURNS & REFUNDS

Return Eligibility:

Customers may request a return if:

* The item is damaged.
* The item is defective.
* The wrong item was received.
* The item significantly differs from its description.

Return Conditions:

Returned items must:

* Be in original condition.
* Include original packaging where possible.
* Be returned within 7 days of delivery.

Non-Returnable Items:

* Customized products
* Digital products
* Perishable goods
* Items damaged through misuse

Refund Process:

Step 1:
Submit a return request.

Step 2:
Return request is reviewed.

Step 3:
Item inspection is completed.

Step 4:
Refund approval is issued.

Refund Timelines:

Approved refunds are processed within 7 to 14 business days.

Refund Methods:

Refunds are issued through the original payment method whenever possible.

Exchange Requests:

Customers may request a replacement item instead of a refund where applicable.

Support Contact:
Email: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Phone: +254 713386680

knowledgeDocuments.name: Hali ya Oda na Ufuatiliaji.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
HALI YA ODA NA UFUATILIAJI

Ninawezaje kufuatilia oda yangu?

Wateja wanaweza kufuatilia oda zao kwa:

1. Kuingia kwenye akaunti yao.
2. Kufungua sehemu ya "Oda Zangu".
3. Kuchagua oda wanayotaka kuona.

Maana ya Hali za Oda:

Inasubiri Kushughulikiwa

* Oda imepokelewa lakini bado haijaanza kushughulikiwa.

Inashughulikiwa

* Oda inaandaliwa na kufungwa kwa ajili ya kutumwa.

Imetumwa

* Oda imetolewa kwa kampuni ya usafirishaji.

Iko Njiani

* Oda iko safarini kuelekea kwa mteja.

Imewasilishwa

* Oda imefika kwa mteja.

Imeghairiwa

* Oda imefutwa kabla ya kutumwa.

Maelezo ya Ufuatiliaji:

Baada ya oda kutumwa, mteja atapokea:

* Nambari ya kufuatilia mzigo
* Jina la kampuni ya usafirishaji
* Makadirio ya tarehe ya kuwasilisha

Iwapo taarifa za ufuatiliaji hazijabadilika ndani ya saa 48, tafadhali wasiliana na huduma kwa wateja.

Mawasiliano:
Barua Pepe: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Simu: +254 713386680

knowledgeDocuments.name: USAFIRISHAJI NA UWASILISHAJI  Maeneo Tunayohudumia:  Tunawasilisha bidhaa katika maeneo yote yanayohudumiwa nchini Kenya.  Muda wa Uwasilishaji:  Nairobi:  * Siku 1 hadi 2 za kazi  Miji Mikuu:  * Siku 2 hadi 4 za kazi  Maeneo ya Mbali:  * Siku 3 hadi 7 za kazi  Gharama za Usafirishaji:  Gharama za usafirishaji huhesabiwa wakati wa kufanya oda kulingana na:  * Mahali pa kuwasilisha * Ukubwa wa oda * Njia ya usafirishaji iliyochaguliwa  Kuchelewa kwa Uwasilishaji:  Huenda kukawa na ucheleweshaji kutokana na:  * Hali mbaya ya hewa * Sikukuu za kitaifa * Oda nyingi kupita kawaida * Changamoto za kampuni ya usafirishaji  Anwani Isiyo Sahihi:  Mteja ana wajibu wa kuhakikisha anatoa anwani sahihi ya kuwasilisha bidhaa.  Bidhaa Iliyoharibika:  Ikiwa bidhaa imewasilishwa ikiwa imeharibika, mteja anatakiwa kutoa taarifa ndani ya saa 24 baada ya kupokea.  Mawasiliano: Barua Pepe: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com) Simu: +254 713386680
knowledgeDocuments.content:
USAFIRISHAJI NA UWASILISHAJI

Maeneo Tunayohudumia:

Tunawasilisha bidhaa katika maeneo yote yanayohudumiwa nchini Kenya.

Muda wa Uwasilishaji:

Nairobi:

* Siku 1 hadi 2 za kazi

Miji Mikuu:

* Siku 2 hadi 4 za kazi

Maeneo ya Mbali:

* Siku 3 hadi 7 za kazi

Gharama za Usafirishaji:

Gharama za usafirishaji huhesabiwa wakati wa kufanya oda kulingana na:

* Mahali pa kuwasilisha
* Ukubwa wa oda
* Njia ya usafirishaji iliyochaguliwa

Kuchelewa kwa Uwasilishaji:

Huenda kukawa na ucheleweshaji kutokana na:

* Hali mbaya ya hewa
* Sikukuu za kitaifa
* Oda nyingi kupita kawaida
* Changamoto za kampuni ya usafirishaji

Anwani Isiyo Sahihi:

Mteja ana wajibu wa kuhakikisha anatoa anwani sahihi ya kuwasilisha bidhaa.

Bidhaa Iliyoharibika:

Ikiwa bidhaa imewasilishwa ikiwa imeharibika, mteja anatakiwa kutoa taarifa ndani ya saa 24 baada ya kupokea.

Mawasiliano:
Barua Pepe: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Simu: +254 713386680

knowledgeDocuments.name: Marejesho na Urejeshaji wa Pesa.txt
knowledgeDocuments.content:
MAREJESHO NA UREJESHAJI WA PESA

Masharti ya Kurudisha Bidhaa:

Mteja anaweza kuomba kurudisha bidhaa ikiwa:

* Bidhaa imeharibika.
* Bidhaa ina kasoro.
* Amepokea bidhaa isiyo sahihi.
* Bidhaa haitofautiani na maelezo yaliyotolewa.

Masharti ya Kukubali Marejesho:

Bidhaa lazima:

* Iwe katika hali nzuri.
* Iwe na vifungashio vyake vya awali inapowezekana.
* Irudishwe ndani ya siku 7 baada ya kupokelewa.

Bidhaa Zisizoweza Kurudishwa:

* Bidhaa zilizotengenezwa maalum kwa mteja.
* Bidhaa za kidijitali.
* Bidhaa zinazoharibika haraka.
* Bidhaa zilizoharibiwa kutokana na matumizi mabaya.

Utaratibu wa Urejeshaji wa Pesa:

1. Mteja anawasilisha ombi la kurejeshewa pesa.
2. Ombi linapitiwa.
3. Bidhaa inakaguliwa.
4. Uamuzi wa kurejesha pesa unafanywa.

Muda wa Kurejesha Pesa:

Pesa zilizokubaliwa kurejeshwa hutumwa ndani ya siku 7 hadi 14 za kazi.

Njia ya Kurejesha Pesa:

Pesa zitarejeshwa kupitia njia ile ile iliyotumika kufanya malipo inapowezekana.

Mawasiliano:
Barua Pepe: [alexnasiali45@gmail.com](mailto:alexnasiali45@gmail.com)
Simu: +254 713386680
